texto: My calling ties me to no office, makes me no man's slave, compels me to no action which my soul condemns. It sets me free from town life, which I loathe; and allows me to breathe clean air, to exercise limbs as well as brain, and to wake up each morning to the wide prospect which to my eyes is the dearest on earth.
explicacao: Citação de J.H.B Peel sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “My calling ties me to no office, makes me no man's slave, compels me to no action which my soul c…” articula trabalho, nature, outside em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e bom-dia.
